question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: '] [Function: getHooks()] Can an unprivileged external user enumerate all hooks belonging to any arbitrary account by supplying any ownerId value in HooksRequest, given that getHooks() performs no ownership/authentication check before calling entityService.lookup(request.getOwnerId()), causing full cross-account data disclosure (IDOR)?
